MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William E. Steimle, Esq. of FILICE BROWN EASSA & McLEOD LLP (510-444-3131), appearing for defendant / moving party Essex Chemical Corporation
Jennifer Alesio, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Gary Allen

RULING:
DEFENDANT ESSEX CHEMICAL CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Essex Chemical Corporation's motion for summary judgment is denied. By failing to present contention interrogatory responses by plaintiffs, defendant did not satisfy its burden of production that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Allen was exposed to asbestos-containing materials or products attributable to defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
